response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with 15+ years of development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, CI infrastructure, MCP code generators), but the role is a people-management position and the resume shows no formal people-management or organizational-leadership experience. Technical leadership is implied through staff-level titles, workshops, and mentoring, yet there is no evidence of conducting performance reviews, managing direct reports, or leading organizational change. Mobile experience exists but is dated and app-level rather than platform-ecosystem-level.
strengths: Deep developer-tools background: authored test runners (Trial), assertion libraries, CI/build infrastructure, and MCP code generators
15+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Strong quality culture: TDD, code katas, workshops, and knowledge-sharing indicate code-review and best-practice fluency
concerns: No formal people-management experience; the JD requires 2+ years managing teams
No demonstrated experience leading organizational change or setting team-level roadmaps and performance expectations
Mobile experience (iOS/Apple TV, 2015-2016) is dated and app-focused, not mobile-platform build/test infrastructure at scale

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure expertise
No organizational leadership or roadmap ownership evidence
